root_text.sn35.139:1.2: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.139:1.5: te pajahatha. Te vo pahīnā hitāya sukhāya bhavissanti.
root_text.sn35.139:1.11: Te vo pahīnā hitāya sukhāya bhavissanti.
root_text.sn35.139:1.12: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, yaṁ imasmiṁ jetavane tiṇakaṭṭha …pe…
root_text.sn35.139:1.13: evameva kho, bhikkhave, rūpā na tumhākaṁ; te pajahatha.
root_text.sn35.139:1.14: Te vo pahīnā hitāya sukhāya bhavissantī”ti ….

translation_text.sn35.139:1.2: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn35.139:1.4: Sights aren’t yours: give them up.
translation_text.sn35.139:1.5: Giving them up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn35.139:1.10: and ideas aren’t yours: give them up.
translation_text.sn35.139:1.11: Giving them up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn35.139:1.12: Suppose a person was to carry off the grass, sticks, branches, and leaves in this Jeta’s Grove …
translation_text.sn35.139:1.13: In the same way, sights, sounds, smells, tastes, touches, and ideas aren’t yours: give them up.
translation_text.sn35.139:1.14: Giving them up will be for your welfare and happiness.”
